description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with a single brown door and a few small window openings visible, suggesting a minimalist design. The interior is divided into several rooms by partition walls, and there is a green rectangular area adjacent to one side, likely representing a small yard or patio. The structure appears to be constructed mainly from concrete or plaster, with wooden elements for the door and window frames. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a simple layout. The lack of ornate details and the flat roof reinforce its contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, brown door, and a small green yard area. The layout is simple and functional, with several interior rooms and minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white exterior, interior partitions, and a brown door at the far end.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the green yard area, main entrance, and window on the right wall.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the green yard area on the left and interior room divisions visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the main brown door and the open, uncluttered back wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with small side and rear windows
